body_txt: Sometimes, a plot involves or is centered on a character needing to carry a cake, pie, a Dagwood Sandwich , or some other food item toward a destination, often under time pressure and with obstacles. This never ends well. This item never arrives as scheduled. Usually it's dropped just before the destination is reached, or else it's stolen, or it's eaten by the character carrying it . If the food item does arrive at its destination, it is rarely in the correct state, or it's unwanted in some capacity once there. If it's a cake, expect it to be a big wedding cake or of similar size for extra mess. Possibly the second most frequent kind of Funny Home Video , after testicular calamity . See also Endangered Soufflé , Dropped Ice Cream of Sadness , and Prop . Related tropes are 30 Minutes, or It's Free! and Dish Dash . Pie in the Face or Faceplanting into Food may result. Sub-Trope of Product Delivery Ordeal . and (possibly) Chekhov's Gun . Or perhaps Tempting Fate .
